channel.title: Photos on Pushpak Prabhat | Animation & Interactive Technology
channel.description: Recent content in Photos on Pushpak Prabhat | Animation & Interactive Technology

item.title: Fantasy Character Sketch
item.description: Working on some fantasy character concepts. This sketch explores dynamic poses and intricate armor details. Part of a 30-day character design challenge! 🎨✏️

item.title: Cyberpunk City Digital Painting
item.description: Exploring cyberpunk aesthetics with this digital painting. Love how the neon lights create depth in the composition. Created using Photoshop and Procreate. 🌃💜

item.title: Brand Identity Illustration Set
item.description: Just completed this illustration set for a brand identity project. The brief was to create modern, inclusive visuals that resonate with Gen Z. Super happy with how the color palette turned out! 🎨

item.title: Fintech App Dashboard Redesign
item.description: Excited to share my latest UI/UX project — a dashboard redesign for a fintech application. The focus was on making complex financial data easy to understand at a glance. Used Figma for prototyping. 📊💡

item.title: Urban Architecture Pencil Study
item.description: Quick urban sketching session during lunch break. Really enjoying the perspective challenges of modern architecture. 🏗️

item.title: Mountain Sunset Digital Art
item.description: Painted this during a relaxing weekend session. Mountains and sunsets never get old as subjects! 🏔️🌅

item.title: E-commerce Mobile App UI
item.description: Designed this e-commerce mobile experience with a focus on micro-interactions. Every swipe and tap should feel delightful! 📱✨
